steps.title: Set up the inequality
steps.content:
Nadia needs at least 120 hours total and currently has 97 hours. If we let $x$ = additional hours needed, then her total will be $97 + x$. The requirement becomes:
$$97 + x \geq 120$$

steps.title: Solve for the minimum
steps.content:
Subtract 97 from both sides to isolate $x$:
$$x \geq 120 - 97$$
$$x \geq 23$$
The minimum number of additional hours is 23. A is correct.
